message:
refactor: improve test assertions and extract const table-driven coverage rules

output_capture: add clear-discards-partial-json test, tighten assertions.
OAuth token: strengthen Debug redaction test (refresh_token, token_type).
agent_api: rustfmt reformatting and readability improvements.
coverage_rules: extract inline rule() calls into const RULE_SPECS arrays
with build_rules() helper (zero behavioral change, pure refactor).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -190,418 +190,411 @@ fn rule(
     }
 }
 
+type RuleSpec = (CoverageCategory, &'static str, bool, u32, bool, bool);
+
+const KERNEL_RULE_SPECS: &[RuleSpec] = &[
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::PositivePath,
+        "happy-path context creation",
+        true,
+        3,
+        false,
+        false,
+    ),
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::NegativePath,
+        "invalid budget / correlation inputs",
+        true,

+        false,
+        false,
+    ),
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::Cancellation,
+        "drain and abort during context ops",
+        true,
+        2,
+        false,
+        false,
+    ),
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::Recovery,

+        true,

+        false,

+        true,
+    ),
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::FailureInjection,
+        "fault injection in runtime context",
+        false,

+        false,
+    ),
+];
+

+const PROVISIONING_RULE_SPECS: &[RuleSpec] = &[
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::PositivePath,
+        "bootstrap injection happy path",
+        true,
+        3,
+        false,
+        false,
+    ),
+    (

+        "invalid bootstrap payload",
+        true,
+        3,
+        false,
+        false,
+    ),
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::Recovery,
+        "credential rotation recovery",
+        true,
+        2,
+        false,
+        false,
+    ),
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::Cancellation,
+        "abort during injection",
+        false,
+        1,
+        false,
+        false,
+    ),
+    (
+        CoverageCategory::FailureInjection,
+        "fault inject in rotation pipeline",
+        false,
+        1,
+        false,
+        false,
+    ),
+];
+
+fn build_rules(subsystem: SubsystemClass, specs: &[RuleSpec]) -> Vec<CoverageRule> {
+    specs
+        .iter()
+        .map(
+            |&(category, description, required, min_cases, requires_host, requires_fuzz)| {
+                rule(
+                    subsystem,
+                    category,
+                    description,
+                    required,
+                    min_cases,
+                    requires_host,
+                    requires_fuzz,
+                )
+            },
+        )
+        .collect()
+}
